title: Fireproof Mace
description: Don't lose your Mace to Fire & Lava!
body:
**⚠️ This data pack requires the server-side mod [Item Components](https://modrinth.com/mod/item-components) ⚠️**

# 🔥 Fireproof Mace
- **Dropped Maces** are now fireproof, making them survive Lava & Fire like Netherite
- **Compatible with vanilla clients**, without any disparity
